document.title: Proposed Labeling & Packaging For Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector HAD1717MC, HAD1717MG

sourceSummary.oneLine: Proposed labeling and packaging document for HAD1717MC and HAD1717MG Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detectors.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports labeling, symbol, power supply, shipment label, packaging, and operating/storage environment information for CE MDD documentation.
keyPoints: Document number A-LABEL-5-01, revision 1, revision date MAR/03/2020.
Detector models are HAD1717MC and HAD1717MG; power supply model is HAD1717M.
Labels state compliance with IEC 60601-1 and IEC 60601-1-2.
HAD1717MC is identified as a CsI Scintillator Detector and HAD1717MG as a GDX Scintillator Detector.
Manufacturer is H&abyz Co., Ltd. in Republic of Korea; JaviTech e.K. in Germany appears on labels.

evidence.evidenceText: Proposed Labeling & Packaging For Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector HAD1717MC, HAD1717MG

evidence.claim: The document number is A-LABEL-5-01.
The revision number is 1.
The revision date is MAR/03/2020.
Revision 1 corrected audit points.
HAD1717MC and HAD1717MG are Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector models.
evidence.evidenceText: Product Name: Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector Model Name: HAD1717MC

evidence.claim: The HAD1717M is the power supply model for HAD1717MC and HAD1717MG.
evidence.evidenceText: Product Name: Power Supply (HAD1717MC&MG) Model Name: HAD1717M

evidence.claim: The detector rating is 12V.
The detector is for use with HAD1717M Power Supply only.
evidence.evidenceText: For use with HAD1717M Power Supply only

evidence.claim: The equipment labels state compliance with IEC 60601-1 and IEC 60601-1-2.
evidence.evidenceText: This equipment complies with IEC 60601-1, IEC 60601-1-2

evidence.claim: HAD1717MC is a CsI Scintillator Detector.
HAD1717MG is a GDX Scintillator Detector.
The power supply input rating is 100-240 V~, 50/60 Hz, 80VA.
The power supply output rating is 12V.
The power supply fuse specification is F3.15AH / 250V.
Storage temperature range is -10 to 50 degrees Celsius.
Operation temperature range is 5 to 40 degrees Celsius.
Storage humidity range is 10 to 80 percent H.R.
Operation humidity range is 30 to 75 percent H.R.
Storage pressure range is 500 to 1060 hPa.
Operating pressure range is 700 to 1060 hPa.

reviewFlags.reason: Source metadata authoritySignal is FDA, but the source path indicates CE MDD and the document text shows CE-style marking 0068 and a Germany representative; no FDA content appears in the document text.
The text includes OCR artifacts and spacing issues such as 'ww.abyzr.com' and 'Straß e', but core metadata and labeling facts are readable.
The CE notified body or authority name is not stated; only the number 0068 appears on labels.
